title: Totemic Advancement Alpha
description: Tinker with totems and double them!
body:
This mod aims to answer the seldom asked question of "What in the world IS a Totem of Undying and what more could I do with it?"  
.  
DEPENDENCIES:
- FABRIC API 
- Patchouli (optional)
  
It features:  

-A new kind of totem  
-A new way to obtain vanilla totems  
-Totem lore (WIP)  
.  
Future plans:  
  
-Ritual-type methods of creating various totems  
-Multi--block structure for that ritual  
-New types of totems  
-Much more lore
